data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Utilizes AWS for scalable and flexible cloud solutions to handle increasing data and user requests.
data.technical_spec: AWS EC2, S3, Lambda, VPC, RDS

data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: Employs a microservices architecture to allow for independent deployment and scalability of different services.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Implements serverless computing to manage backend processes without server management complexities.

data.title: CI/CD Pipeline
data.description: Continuous integration and continuous deployment pipeline automates testing and deployment.

data.title: Data Management and Storage
data.description: Uses distributed databases to manage large-scale data and ensure high availability.
